_comment: Authoritative mirror list for the resilience service worker (sw.js). Only entries with enabled:true and a non-empty url are used. Canonical origin (cruxcoach.org) is intentionally NOT listed here. Fill url + flip enabled:true once each host actually serves the byte-identical site (task: finalize concrete mirror hosts).

mirrors.note: Codeberg Pages legacy backend. Repo is 'cruxcoach-pages' (not 'pages') so the codeberg.page URL is likely https://cruxcoach.codeberg.page/cruxcoach-pages — VERIFY the exact reachable URL before enabling; do not guess.
Existing server-side GitHub mirror. Fill the github.io Pages URL once Pages is enabled on it (do not guess the URL).
Planned free FOSS mirror (Disroot Forgejo Pages) — set up, then fill url.
Planned nsite (Nostr+Blossom) gateway URL, e.g. https://<npub>.nsite.lol — fill once published via nsyte.
Planned IPFS gateway URL for the pinned CID — fill once pinned (Filebase free tier) and _dnslink TXT is set.
